name: Mock Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the mixture to a boil.
2. Drop in crackers one at a time until all are incorporated.
3. Place the mixture in an uncooked pie shell.
4. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
5. Put dabs of butter on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
Tastes like real apple pie.
